rejected.overall_reasoning: Penny-Stock LiDAR, BMW-Vertrag, hohe Verluste, stark umkämpft
rejected.thesis: Automotive-Grade LiDAR für autonome Fahrzeuge und Robotik. Exklusiver LiDAR-Lieferant für BMW. InnovizTwo-Sensor bietet hohe Auflösung bei niedrigen Kosten — entscheidend für humanoide Roboter-Vision.

Autonome Sicherheitsroboter (K5, K7) für Patrouillen in Einkaufszentren, Parkplätzen, Firmengeländen. Einziger börsennotierter Pure-Play im Bereich autonome Sicherheitsrobotik. Subscription-Modell (RaaS).

rejected.overall_reasoning: GPU-Cloud mit 547% YoY Wachstum. Aber Q4 EPS-Miss -64%, Kurs -13% an einem Tag.
rejected.thesis: GPU-schwere Cloud-Infrastruktur für Unternehmen die Rechenleistung brauchen. Einer der direktesten Picks-and-Shovels AI-Plays — bietet Compute-Kapazität in Zeiten knapper GPU-Verfügbarkeit. Ehemals Yandex N.V., jetzt reiner AI-Infrastruktur-Fokus.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Über 1000 Lieferroboter im Einsatz. Uber+Nvidia Backing. Aber EPS -1.44, MC $744M.
rejected.thesis: Autonome Lieferroboter auf Gehwegen — über 1000 Roboter im Einsatz, 10x Umsatzwachstum 2026 erwartet. Uber-Partnerschaft, Nvidia-Investment. Pure-Play Robotik mit LiDAR und KI-Navigation.

rejected.overall_reasoning: GenesisX-Roboter einzigartig. 90% Upside zum PT. Aber MC $206M, unprofitabel, Penny-Stock-Bereich.
rejected.thesis: Robotische Magnetnavigation für Herzeingriffe. GenesisX-System senkt Installationskosten drastisch. Nische in der chirurgischen Robotik mit Alleinstellungsmerkmal bei magnetgesteuerter Katheterführung.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Capex-Kürzung für 2026 bestätigt, Aktie -3.7%. Analog-Chip Nachfrage erholt sich langsam.
rejected.thesis: Liefert Nerven und Muskeln jedes Roboters: Analog-Chips, Sensoren, Motorcontroller. Egal welcher Hersteller gewinnt — TXN profitiert. Pickel-und-Schaufel-Play.

rejected.overall_reasoning: China -45%, Europa -44%, Absatz-Katastrophe. $243M Autopilot-Urteil. Austin-Robotaxi-Unfälle. P/E 237x bei sinkendem Umsatz. Cybercab-Produktion gestartet aber überwiegt nicht die Risiken.
Negativer Trend: Kurs fiel von 144 auf 128 (-11% im Monat). Sell-Rating, 43% Fenglong-Beteiligung fragwürdig, EPS negativ. WisdomTree ETF-Aufnahme positiv aber reicht nicht.
Q4 EPS +20%, Guidance .50-3.65. Aber Preis fällt von  auf . Markt nicht überzeugt.
rejected.thesis: Hidden Champion für Robotik-Komponenten: Präzisionsmotoren, Encoder, Servo-Drives, robotic End-of-Arm-Technologie und Laser. Liefert die Muskeln und Nerven für Roboter. Small-Mid-Cap mit hohem Hebel auf Robotik/Medizintechnik-Automatisierung. Top-Holding im ROBO ETF.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Keine Preisdaten, kein aktiver Handel. Board-Refresh geplant. These stark aber nicht investierbar ohne Liquidität. 6324.T ist das bessere Vehikel.
rejected.thesis: Quasi-Monopolist für Strain-Wave-Getriebe (Harmonic Drives) — das kritischste Bauteil in jedem Robotergelenk. Jeder Humanoid-Roboter braucht 10-20 dieser Reducer. Morningstar sieht dominante Marktposition als perfekte Positionierung für den Humanoid-Boom der nächsten 5 Jahre. Kleine Firma mit enormem Hebel auf Robotik-Megatrend.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Solides Unternehmen aber Analysten sehen Überbewertung: Avg Target $58 vs Kurs $91. Hold/Sell-Konsens. Rekord-Margen positiv, aber wenig Upside laut Analysten.
rejected.thesis: Schweizer Industriegigant und einer der Big 4 der Industrierobotik. Starke Position in Cobots, Elektrifizierung UND Robotik. Rekord-Auftragseingang 2025, zuversichtlicher Ausblick 2026. Diversifiziert über Elektrifizierung, Automation, Robotik. Solide Dividende + Aktienrückkauf-Programm 2026.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Cobot-These intakt aber keine neuen Insights. Kurs leicht gestiegen auf 107.300. Ohne frische Katalysatoren bleibt Score stabil. Korea-Zugang limitiert Investorenbasis.
rejected.thesis: Südkoreas führender Cobot-Hersteller und einer der weltweit Top-5 Cobot-Produzenten. Pure-Play auf kollaborative Robotik — kein Mischkonzern. Cobots wachsen 20%+ pro Jahr, immer mehr KMUs setzen sie ein. ROI typisch in 12-36 Monaten. Doosan hat breites Portfolio von leichten bis schweren Cobots für Fertigung, F&B und Logistik.

rejected.overall_reasoning: Warehouse-Automation-These intakt, 58% unter ATH. Aber keine frischen News oder Katalysatoren. Kurs flach. Wartemodus bis nächste Earnings.
rejected.thesis: Führend bei Barcode-Scannern, RFID, mobilen Computern und Warehouse-Automation. Robotik-Angst-Opfer: Aktie 58% unter ATH wegen Automatisierungsängsten — dabei profitiert Zebra DIREKT davon! Ihre Geräte sind die Schnittstelle zwischen Mensch und Roboter im Lager. Jeder Amazon-Roboter braucht Zebra-Infrastruktur für Tracking/Koordination.

insights.headline: Plunged 13% Feb 27 on CoreWeave capex doubling and Q4 miss
insights.summary: NBIS fell 13.05% on Feb 27 on heavy volume (22.8M shares) as CoreWeave doubled 2026 capex guidance, raising concerns about AI infra spending outpacing returns.

insights.headline: Q4 earnings miss revenue $227.7M vs $246M expected EPS -$0.69 vs -$0.42
insights.summary: NBIS missed Q4 on revenue and EPS. Plunged 13% on Feb 27 after CoreWeave doubled capex guidance. Still Strong Buy 4 analysts, avg target $152.75 vs $91.19 current. Pre-market -4.87% today on geopolitics.

insights.headline: Pre-market down 2.79% on geopolitical risk-off Middle East tensions
insights.summary: ANET $129.77 pre-market (-2.79%). No new company news. Q4 beat solid ($0.82 vs $0.75 est), AI networking revenue target doubled to $3.25B. Goldman target $188. Strong Buy 13 analysts.

insights.headline: Pre-market down 3.41% on geopolitical risk-off broader market weakness
insights.summary: VRT $246.20 pre-market (-3.41%) on Middle East tensions. No company-specific news. Strong Q4 earnings (252% organic orders growth, $15B backlog) still intact. S&P 500 addition 75% likely per Polymarket.

insights.headline: Pre-market surging 6.72% to $748 on NVIDIA $2B strategic partnership and equity investment
insights.summary: LITE surging +6.72% pre-market to $748 after NVIDIA announced multiyear strategic partnership with $2B equity investment for advanced laser R&D and US manufacturing. WSJ and CNBC covering. Stock up 657% in past year.

insights.headline: Pre-market down 2.90% on US-Israel Iran strikes geopolitical selloff
insights.summary: MU pre-market $400.43 (-2.90%) on Mar 2 due to Middle East conflict driving risk-off. Despite strong fundamentals and HBM demand.

insights.headline: UBS raises target to $475 Stifel to $550 Goldman reiterates on DRAM pricing strength
insights.summary: Multiple analyst upgrades today: UBS $475, Stifel $550 (Buy), Goldman reiterates on DRAM pricing. TD Cowen street-high $600. Earnings March 18.

insights.headline: NVIDIA invests $2B in Lumentum for photonics partnership
insights.summary: NVIDIA committed $2B investment in Lumentum Holdings for state-of-the-art optics technology for AI networking. Major catalyst for LITE stock.

insights.headline: Pre-market down 1.55% on US-Israel Iran strikes geopolitical risk-off
insights.summary: NVDA pre-market $174.45 (-1.55%) on Mar 2 due to escalating geopolitical tensions from US-Israel strikes on Iran over weekend. Broad risk-off move, oil surging.

insights.headline: Post-earnings selloff 4.16% despite record beat sell-the-news
insights.summary: Despite record Q4 beat, NVDA fell 4.16% on Feb 27 and 5.46% on Feb 26. Sell-the-news dynamic, concerns over AI capex sustainability and insider selling ($292M in 90 days).

insights.headline: Q4 earnings beat $68.13B revenue up 73% YoY guided $78B Q1
insights.summary: NVIDIA Q4 FY26: $68.13B revenue (+73% YoY), data center $62.3B. Q1 guidance $78B vs $72.9B consensus. Massive beat but stock sold off on profit-taking.

insights.headline: NVIDIA invests $2B in Lumentum and $2B in Coherent for photonics
insights.summary: NVIDIA announced strategic partnerships with Coherent and Lumentum, committing $2B to each company for photonic AI networking technology. Huge for LITE in our watchlist.

insights.headline: Symbotic stable amid warehouse automation demand
insights.summary: Warehouse automation and AI-driven logistics continue as growth themes for SYM.

insights.headline: Eaton +0.28% steady amid industrial rotation into AI power infrastructure
insights.summary: ETN at $374.59. Industrials outperforming tech in 2026 rotation. Data center electrical infrastructure demand remains tailwind.

insights.headline: Talen Energy benefits from data center power demand narrative
insights.summary: Data center power demand theme remains strong. AI infrastructure buildout driving electricity demand expectations higher.

insights.headline: ServiceNow trading at $109.30, broader SaaS weakness continues
insights.summary: NOW pre-market shows modest strength (+4.86%). SaaS sector under pressure from AI disruption fears but showing signs of recovery. Stock near 52-week lows.

insights.headline: Q4 revenue miss $227.7M vs $246M est but 547% YoY growth, acquired Tavily for $275M
insights.summary: Q4 revenue $227.7M vs $246M expected, EPS -$0.69 vs -$0.42 est. But 547% YoY growth and first positive EBITDA. Raised 2026 targets: $7-9B ARR, 800MW-1GW capacity. Acquired Tavily (AI search) for $275M. $16-20B capex plan. Pre-market -5.6%. 4 analysts, 100% bullish, avg target $152.75.

insights.headline: Q4 EPS $3.81 crushes $3.05 est, $50B buyback, but weak FY2027 revenue guidance
insights.summary: Q4 adj EPS $3.81 vs $3.05 est, revenue $11.2B (+12.1% YoY). Announced massive $50B buyback and 5.8% dividend raise. Agentforce hit $800M ARR. But FY2027 revenue guide $45.8-$46.2B near consensus, disappointing bulls. Stock -3.3% pre-market on weak top-line outlook despite earnings strength.

insights.headline: Q4 first $1B quarter but EPS misses by 40%, stock drops 10.3% on rebrand concerns
insights.summary: Revenue $1.06B (+20% YoY) beat estimates but EPS missed by >40%. Rebranded to Everpure, acquiring 1touch (data intelligence). FY2027 guidance $4.3-$4.4B above consensus. Stock fell 10.3% on execution uncertainty, rich P/E ~174. Multiple analysts cut targets: Citi and Evercore to $90 from $105. Pre-market extends losses -4.5%.

insights.headline: Q4 beat: EPS $0.82 vs $0.75 est, revenue $2.49B (+28.9% YoY), raised 2026 outlook
insights.summary: Strong Q4, AI networking revenue doubled to $3.25B target for 2026. Goldman raised to $188, Evercore to $200. 13 analysts: 92.3% bullish, avg target $180. Notable: AMD now 20-25% of accelerator deployments vs near-zero a year ago.

insights.headline: Concerns cloud operators developing own cooling tech weighs on shares
insights.summary: Pre-market -3.4% on concerns hyperscalers may develop in-house cooling solutions, reducing demand for third-party providers. Broader NVDA post-earnings weakness adds pressure. Stock at $250.38 pre-market from $259.23 close.

insights.headline: Q4 organic orders +252%, backlog $15B, blowout FY2026 guidance crushes estimates
insights.summary: Q4 EPS $1.36 vs $1.29 est, revenue $2.88B (+22.7% YoY). FY2026 guidance: revenue $13.25-$13.75B (est $12.39B), EPS $5.97-$6.07 (est $5.33). Backlog doubled to $15B. Stock surged 24.5% on earnings day. Analysts: Mizuho $290, Morgan Stanley $285, Citi $286, Goldman $277. 12 analysts, 100% bullish.

insights.headline: Pre-market down 2.4% spillover from NVDA post-earnings weakness
insights.summary: MU trading at $405.74 pre-market (-2.36%) as NVDA post-earnings selloff pressures AI-linked semiconductor names. Stock at $415.56, up 330% past year. Earnings March 18.

insights.headline: India PM Modi inaugurates Micron semiconductor plant in Gujarat Feb 28
insights.summary: PM Modi to inaugurate Rs 22,516 crore (~$2.7B) semiconductor facility in Sanand, Gujarat on Feb 28. Part of Microns $200B US+global capacity buildout for HBM and AI memory.

insights.headline: Deutsche Bank raises target to $500, TD Cowen street-high $600
insights.summary: Multiple upgrades: Deutsche Bank $300→$500, TD Cowen $600 (street-high), HSBC $500, Morgan Stanley $450, Needham $450, Mizuho $480. 22 analysts: 95.5% bullish. HBM supply sold out through 2026, DRAM shortage expected through 2027+.

insights.headline: Multiple analyst upgrades to $300 target after Q4 earnings
insights.summary: BofA, Robert W. Baird, and Sanford C. Bernstein raised price targets to $300 citing AI infrastructure demand and Blackwell/Vera Rubin roadmap. 33 analysts: 97% bullish, avg target $275, high $352. Strong Buy consensus maintained.

insights.headline: Q4 earnings beat revenue $68.1B but stock drops 8% on profit-taking
insights.summary: Record Q4 revenue $68.1B (+73% YoY), data center $62.3B (+75%), Q1 guidance $78B beats estimates. Despite blowout results, stock fell 5.46% on earnings day and another 1.44% pre-market Feb 27. Analysts raised targets to $300 (BofA, Baird, Bernstein). Concerns: customer concentration (8 hyperscalers >50% revenue), insider selling $292M/90 days, AMD capturing 20-25% accelerator share.

insights.summary: Surgical robotics and orthopedic devices market growing with aging demographics.

insights.summary: Infrastructure construction company benefiting from data center and electrical buildout.

insights.summary: Utility seeing growing demand from data center customers in Southeast US.

insights.summary: Electrical connection and protection solutions for data centers seeing strong demand.

insights.summary: Electrical construction benefiting from grid modernization and data center buildout.

insights.summary: Japanese robotics leader benefiting from manufacturing automation and AI integration.

insights.headline: Five9 contact center AI disruption concerns
insights.summary: Cloud contact center under pressure from AI agent disruption fears alongside broader SaaS sector.

insights.headline: Innodata AI data annotation services in demand
insights.summary: AI training data services company benefiting from growing LLM development activity.

insights.summary: Semiconductor test equipment demand supported by AI chip production ramp.

insights.summary: Factory automation and industrial AI applications driving long-term demand.

insights.summary: Diversified manufacturing services provider benefiting from AI infrastructure buildout.

insights.headline: Thomson Reuters AI legal and professional services integration
insights.summary: Legal AI tools market growing rapidly. Thomson Reuters expanding AI capabilities in professional information services.

insights.headline: Serve Robotics sidewalk delivery robots expanding operations
insights.summary: Autonomous delivery robot company expanding deployment areas and partnerships.

insights.headline: Hesai Group lidar technology for autonomous vehicles
insights.summary: Lidar technology demand growing with autonomous driving development acceleration.

insights.headline: Texas Instruments analog chip demand steady amid auto/industrial recovery
insights.summary: Analog and embedded processing chip demand stabilizing. Factory buildout in US continues.

insights.headline: Symbotic warehouse automation demand amid AI logistics growth
insights.summary: AI-driven warehouse automation solutions gaining traction with major retailers.

insights.headline: Intuitive Surgical maintains surgical robotics leadership
insights.summary: Da Vinci robotic surgery platform continues strong adoption. AI integration into surgical workflows expanding.

insights.headline: Digital Realty benefits from AI-driven data center demand
insights.summary: REIT benefiting from insatiable demand for data center capacity driven by AI workloads.

insights.headline: Modine Manufacturing data center thermal management demand strong
insights.summary: Data center cooling demand driving revenue growth for thermal management solutions.

insights.headline: Celestica rides AI hardware demand as electronics manufacturing partner
insights.summary: CLS benefits from hyperscaler server and networking equipment manufacturing demand.

insights.headline: Quanta Services benefits from electrical infrastructure buildout
insights.summary: Data center construction and grid modernization driving demand for electrical contractors.

insights.headline: Data center cooling demand supports HVAC infrastructure
insights.summary: AI infrastructure buildout driving demand for cooling solutions in data centers.

insights.headline: Eaton benefits from data center and electrification trends
insights.summary: Data center power infrastructure demand strong. Industrial sector rotation benefiting electrical equipment makers.

insights.headline: Data center power demand continues to drive utility stocks
insights.summary: AI data center buildout driving demand for power infrastructure. Hyperscalers planning $650B+ in capex for 2026.

insights.headline: Software sector selloff weighing on IT services including Accenture
insights.summary: Broader SaaSpocalypse fears driving enterprise software and services lower. Gartner Q4 miss with 12.8% consulting revenue decline spooked IT services sector.

insights.headline: ServiceNow acquires Pyramid Analytics to embed AI analytics into workflows
insights.summary: Acquired Israeli BI firm Pyramid Analytics (est hundreds of millions). Builds on Workflow Data Fabric strategy. Also acquired Armis $7.75B, Veza. Moveworks gained FedRAMP approval for public sector.

insights.headline: NVIDIA CEO Huang defends ServiceNow - nobody services better than ServiceNow
insights.summary: Jensen Huang during NVDA earnings call said markets got it wrong on AI threats to enterprise software, specifically defending NOW. Stock -51% from 52W high. CEO McDermott buying $3M in stock, 5 execs canceled stock sales. AI ACV reached $600M, targeting $1B in 2026. Acquired Pyramid Analytics.

insights.headline: Nebius Q4 revenue miss but 547% YoY growth, raises ARR target to $7-9B, acquires Tavily for $275M
insights.summary: Q4 revenue $227.7M vs $246M est, EPS -$0.69 vs -$0.42 est. But 547% YoY growth. ARR exceeded $1.2B. FY26 guide $3.0-3.4B. $16-20B capex planned. Compass Point initiated Buy $150 PT. Share buyback announced.

insights.headline: Pure Storage first $1B quarter - rebrands to Everpure, acquires 1touch
insights.summary: Q4 revenue $1.06B (up 20% YoY), EPS $0.69 both beat. Rebranded to Everpure. Acquiring 1touch data intelligence firm. FY27 guide $4.3-4.4B vs $4.27B est. RPO surged 40% to $3.7B. Stock +8.6% on results.

insights.headline: Vertiv secures investment-grade credit rating
insights.summary: Vertiv achieved investment-grade credit rating, reducing borrowing costs. 12 analysts all Bullish, avg target $235.5 but stock already at $262. Mizuho $290, Morgan Stanley $285.

insights.headline: Vertiv Q4 blowout - orders up 252%, backlog $15B, 2026 guidance crushes estimates
insights.summary: Organic orders +252% YoY, backlog doubled to $15B. FY26 revenue guide $13.25-13.75B vs $12.39B est. EPS guide $5.97-6.07 vs $5.33 est. Stock surged 24.5% on results. Secured investment-grade credit rating. 81% chance of S&P 500 inclusion Q1 2026 per Polymarket.

insights.headline: Arista Q4 earnings beat - EPS $0.82 vs $0.75 est, raised 2026 AI revenue target to $3.25B
insights.summary: Q4 revenue $2.49B up 28.9% YoY. Doubled AI networking revenue outlook to $3.25B for 2026. Goldman raised PT to $188, Evercore to $200. AMD now 20-25% of accelerator deployments vs ~99% NVIDIA a year ago.

insights.headline: Intuit announces multi-year AI partnership with Anthropic for QuickBooks and TurboTax agents
insights.summary: Multi-year deal with Anthropic to build customizable AI agents for QuickBooks and TurboTax, rollouts starting spring 2026. Stock surged 6.28% on the news. Wells Fargo cut PT to $425, Morgan Stanley maintains $880. Stock near 52-week low at $381, down ~53% from highs.

insights.headline: Salesforce announces $50B share buyback, Agentforce ARR hits $800M
insights.summary: Massive $50B buyback announced. Agentforce ARR surged to $800M from $540M prior quarter, 169% YoY growth. Benioff called selloff a buying opportunity. Goldman cut PT to $281 from $330, maintains Buy.

insights.headline: Salesforce Q4 earnings beat - EPS $3.81 vs $3.04 est, but FY27 guidance slightly below consensus
insights.summary: Q4 EPS $3.81 crushed $3.04 est. Revenue $11.2B, 12% YoY growth (fastest in 2 years). But FY27 revenue guide $45.8-46.2B slightly below $46.06B consensus. Stock -1.7% pre-market despite beat.

insights.headline: PM Modi to inaugurate Micron ATMP plant in Gujarat Feb 28
insights.summary: India PM Modi will inaugurate Microns assembly, test, marking and packaging plant in Gujarat on Feb 28. Part of Microns global expansion strategy.

insights.headline: Deutsche Bank raises MU target to $500, HBM supply sold out through 2026
insights.summary: Deutsche Bank raised PT from $300 to $500. TD Cowen has street-high $600. 22 analysts Strong Buy avg $388.86. HBM4 in high-volume production, supply committed through 2026.

insights.headline: NVIDIA finalizing investment deal with OpenAI
insights.summary: NVIDIA confirms finalizing deal with OpenAI. Also sees hundreds of billions in future robotaxi revenue. Stock +0.94% pre-market after earnings beat.

insights.headline: NVIDIA Q4 earnings beat - revenue $68.1B up 73% YoY, Q1 guidance $78B crushes estimates
insights.summary: Q4 FY26 revenue $68.13B vs ~$65.8B consensus. Data center $62.3B. Q1 guidance $78B vs $72.9B est. Blackwell demand insatiable. 31 analysts Strong Buy, avg target $272.

insights.headline: Adobe Firefly launches Quick Cut AI video editing feature
insights.summary: New AI-powered Quick Cut feature in Firefly automates video editing workflows. Announced Feb 26.

insights.headline: Goldman Sachs downgraded Adobe to Sell with $290 target
insights.summary: Goldman initiated Sell rating citing 10% revenue growth trailing 11% peer average and 10% EPS growth vs 18% for competitors. BMO also cut to Market Perform, Jefferies to Hold.

insights.headline: Adobe hit new 52-week low at $250.77 amid SaaSpocalypse fears
insights.summary: ADBE touched $250.77 on Feb 23, its lowest in years. Software sector selloff intensified on AI disruption fears. Put-option activity up 248% vs normal volume. Stock trades ~43% below 52-week high.

score_history.reasoning: Yaskawa Electric Japanischer Gigant und Weltmarktführer bei Servomotoren — dem Herzstück jedes Roboters. Baut außerdem eigene Industrieroboter und expandiert stark im . Risiken: Japanische Yen-Schwäche vs USD, Tarif-Risiken für japanische Exporteure,
